attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-998) PRODUCT_KEY                   
,CASE WHEN NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ='UNKNOWN'  THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y'  END RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_ROLE       
,SORCTL.UOM_CODE RU_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CODE       
,SORCTL.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE RU_UNIT_STD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT       
 ,SORCTL.RULE_START_DATE RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE 
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN SORCTL.QUANTITY_INVOICED ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY             
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN SORCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_UNIT_AMOUNT          
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT      
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN SORCTL.QUANTITY_CREDITED ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY            
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN SORCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_UNIT_AMOUNT         
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT     
,NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN 'DEBIT' END AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   
,CASE WHEN SORCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID IS NULL THEN 'MONEY ONLY' ELSE 'PRODUCT' END MONEY_ONLY_TYPE               
,CAST(SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AS BIGINT) SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  
,'OOD' SS_CODE 

     
,USER EDW_CREATE_USER
,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)   EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME              
, SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE4 REVENUE_SOURCE_CD
,SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE3 SERVICE_CONTRACT_NOTE_TXT
,SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION RU_ACCTG_RULE_DURATION_MTH_CNT 
,SORCTL.RULE_START_DATE  RU_REV_TRNSFR_CNTRCT_START_DT
,SORCTL.RULE_END_DATE   RU_REV_TRNSFR_CNTRCT_END_DT   
,SORCTL.ACTION_CODE ACTION_CODE                   
,'I' DML_TYPE
                
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SORCTL
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
	ON(SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
	AND SATL.SS_CODE='OOD')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON (SORCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_RULES SORR
ON SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID = SORR.RULE_ID
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
ON NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME=SORR.NAME
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON (SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT
	ON (NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
WHERE SORCTL.LINE_TYPE='LINE'
UNION ALL
SELECT
SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-998) PRODUCT_KEY                   
,CASE WHEN NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ='UNKNOWN'  THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y'  END RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_ROLE       
,EORCTLI.UOM_CODE RU_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CODE       
,EORCTLI.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE RU_UNIT_STD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT   
,EORCTLI.RULE_START_DATE RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE 
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EORCTLI.QUANTITY_INVOICED ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY             
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EORCTLI.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_UNIT_AMOUNT          
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EORCTLI.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT      
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN EORCTLI.QUANTITY_CREDITED ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY            
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN EORCTLI.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_UNIT_AMOUNT         
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN EORCTLI.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT     
,NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN 'DEBIT' END AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   
,CASE WHEN EORCTLI.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID IS NULL THEN 'MONEY ONLY' ELSE 'PRODUCT' END MONEY_ONLY_TYPE               
,EORCTLI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  
,'OOD' SS_CODE


,USER EDW_CREATE_USER
,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)   EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME                 
,EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE4 REVENUE_SOURCE_CD
,EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE3 SERVICE_CONTRACT_NOTE_TXT
,EORCTLI.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION RU_ACCTG_RULE_DURATION_MTH_CNT
,EORCTLI.RULE_START_DATE RU_REV_TRNSFR_CNTRCT_START_DT   
,EORCTLI.RULE_END_DATE 	 RU_REV_TRNSFR_CNTRCT_END_DT                  
,EORCTLI.ACTION_CODE ACTION_CODE                   
,'I' DML_TYPE 
                    
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EORCTLI
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
	ON(EORCTLI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
	AND SATL.SS_CODE= 'OOD')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON (EORCTLI.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
	ON (EORCTLI.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID = NAAR.SK_RULE_ID_INT
	AND (CASE WHEN EORCTLI.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID<> -999 THEN NAAR.SS_CODE ELSE SATL.SS_CODE END) =SATL.SS_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON (SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT
	ON (NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
WHERE EORCTLI.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'

UNION ALL

/*OOD FUSN CODE*/
SELECT
SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-998) PRODUCT_KEY                   
,CASE WHEN NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ='UNKNOWN'  THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y'  END RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_ROLE       
,SOFRCTL.UOM_CODE RU_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CODE       
,SOFRCTL.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE RU_UNIT_STD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT       
 ,SOFRCTL.RULE_START_DATE RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE 
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN SOFRCTL.QUANTITY_INVOICED ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY             
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN SOFRCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_UNIT_AMOUNT          
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN SOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT      
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN SOFRCTL.QUANTITY_CREDITED ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY            
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN SOFRCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_UNIT_AMOUNT         
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN SOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT     
,NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN 'DEBIT' END AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   
,CASE WHEN SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID IS NULL THEN 'MONEY ONLY' ELSE 'PRODUCT' END MONEY_ONLY_TYPE               
,SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  
,'OOD' SS_CODE 

     
,USER EDW_CREATE_USER
,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)   EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME              
, SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE4 REVENUE_SOURCE_CD
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE3 SERVICE_CONTRACT_NOTE_TXT
,SOFRCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION RU_ACCTG_RULE_DURATION_MTH_CNT 
,SOFRCTL.RULE_START_DATE  RU_REV_TRNSFR_CNTRCT_START_DT
,SOFRCTL.RULE_END_DATE   RU_REV_TRNSFR_CNTRCT_END_DT   
,SOFRCTL.ACTION_CODE ACTION_CODE                   
,'I' DML_TYPE
                
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SOFRCTL
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
	ON(SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
	AND SATL.SS_CODE='OOD')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON (SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_RULES SORR
ON SOFRCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID = SORR.RULE_ID
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
ON NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME=SORR.NAME
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON (SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT
	ON (NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
WHERE SOFRCTL.LINE_TYPE='LINE'
UNION ALL
SELECT
SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-998) PRODUCT_KEY                   
,CASE WHEN NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ='UNKNOWN'  THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y'  END RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_ROLE       
,EOFRCTL.UOM_CODE RU_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CODE       
,EOFRCTL.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE RU_UNIT_STD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT   
,EOFRCTL.RULE_START_DATE RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE 
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EOFRCTL.QUANTITY_INVOICED ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY             
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EOFRCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_UNIT_AMOUNT          
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT      
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN EOFRCTL.QUANTITY_CREDITED ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY            
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN EOFRCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_UNIT_AMOUNT         
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN EOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT     
,NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN 'DEBIT' END AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   
,CASE WHEN EOFRCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID IS NULL THEN 'MONEY ONLY' ELSE 'PRODUCT' END MONEY_ONLY_TYPE               
,EOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  
,'OOD' SS_CODE


,USER EDW_CREATE_USER
,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)   EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME                 
,EOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE4 REVENUE_SOURCE_CD
,EOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE3 SERVICE_CONTRACT_NOTE_TXT
,EOFRCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION RU_ACCTG_RULE_DURATION_MTH_CNT
,EOFRCTL.RULE_START_DATE RU_REV_TRNSFR_CNTRCT_START_DT   
,EOFRCTL.RULE_END_DATE 	 RU_REV_TRNSFR_CNTRCT_END_DT                  
,EOFRCTL.ACTION_CODE ACTION_CODE                   
,'I' DML_TYPE 
                    
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EOFRCTL
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
	ON(EOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
	AND SATL.SS_CODE= 'OOD')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON (EOFRCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
	ON (EOFRCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID = NAAR.SK_RULE_ID_INT
	AND (CASE WHEN EOFRCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID<> -999 THEN NAAR.SS_CODE ELSE SATL.SS_CODE END) =SATL.SS_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON (SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT
	ON (NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
WHERE EOFRCTL.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'

SELECT
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11, INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12, INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14, 
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15, ORG_ID, GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7, 
CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, REASON_CODE, 
GLOBAL_ORDER_NUMBER, QUANTITY_CREDITED, QUANTITY_INVOICED, UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE, 
UNIT_SELLING_PRICE, ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID, LINE_TYPE, 
RULE_START_DATE,
 INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT, 
GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID,
 INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2,
 GLOBAL_LINE_ID, 
EXTENDED_AMOUNT, 
LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID, 
ATTRIBUTE15, 
ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION, 
DESCRIPTION, 
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8,
 LINE_NUMBER, 
TAX_RATE, 
UOM_CODE, 
CREATION_DATE,
 ATTRIBUTE3,
 ATTRIBUTE4, 
PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 CREATE_DATETIME, 
ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
RULE_END_DATE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SORCTL,
(SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES WHERE GLOBAL_NAME= 'OOD') NSSC
WHERE 
SORCTL.LINE_TYPE='LINE'
AND
(
NOT EXISTS 
	(
	SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_RULES SORR, $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
	WHERE SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID= SORR.RULE_ID
AND SORR.NAME=NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
	)
OR 
NOT EXISTS 
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL, $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT
	WHERE SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE
	AND SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
	AND NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE	= NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY	= NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE	= NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
	)
OR
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
	WHERE SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE
	)
)
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EXORCTL
WHERE EXORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID)

SELECT SOFRCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION      
,SOFRCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID            
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE15                   
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE3                    
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE4                    
,SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID               
,SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID          
,SOFRCTL.DESCRIPTION                   
,SOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT               
,SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7             
,SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_ORDER_NUMBER           
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11    
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12    
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14    
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15    
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2     
,SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID                
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8     
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT        
,SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID             
,SOFRCTL.LINE_NUMBER                   
,SOFRCTL.LINE_TYPE                     
,SOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID      
,SOFRCTL.ORG_ID                        
,SOFRCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
,SOFRCTL.QUANTITY_CREDITED             
,SOFRCTL.QUANTITY_INVOICED             
,SOFRCTL.REASON_CODE                   
,SOFRCTL.RULE_START_DATE               
,SOFRCTL.TAX_RATE                      
,SOFRCTL.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE           
,SOFRCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE            
,SOFRCTL.UOM_CODE                      
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE1                    
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE2                    
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6     
,SOFRCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             
,SOFRCTL.CREATION_DATE                 
,SOFRCTL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,SOFRCTL.RULE_END_DATE                 
,SOFRCTL.SPLIT_KEY                     
,SOFRCTL.CREATE_DATETIME               
,SOFRCTL.ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SOFRCTL,
(SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES WHERE GLOBAL_NAME= 'OOD') NSSC
WHERE 
SOFRCTL.LINE_TYPE='LINE'
AND
(
NOT EXISTS 
	(
	SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_RULES SORR, $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
	WHERE SOFRCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID= SORR.RULE_ID
AND SORR.NAME=NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
	)
OR 
NOT EXISTS 
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL, $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT
	WHERE SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE
	AND SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
	AND NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE	= NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY	= NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE	= NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
	)
OR
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
	WHERE SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE
	)
)
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EXORCTL
WHERE EXORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID)
